mapper.select:
SELECT page_tc.test_case_id AS "testCaseId", page_tc.version_id AS "versionId", page_tc.version_name AS "versionName", page_tc.title AS "title",
page_tc.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", page_tc.test_type_name AS "testTypeName",
page_tc.status_code AS "statusCode", page_tc.status_name AS "statusName",
page_tc.priority_code AS "priorityCode", page_tc.priority_name AS "priorityName",
page_tc.pre_condition AS "preCondition", page_tc.expected_result AS "expectedResult", page_tc.description AS "description", page_tc.exe_enviroment AS "exeEnviroment",
page_tc.created_by AS "createdBy", NVL(creator.login_id, page_tc.created_by) AS "createdByName",
page_tc.created_at AS "createdAt", page_tc.updated_at AS "updatedAt"
FROM ( SELECT inner_query.* FROM ( SELECT base_query.*, ROWNUM AS row_no FROM ( SELECT tc.test_case_id, tc.version_id, pv.version_name, tc.title,
tc.test_type_code, CASE tc.test_type_code WHEN 'd001' THEN '기능' WHEN 'd002' THEN 'UI/UX' WHEN 'd003' THEN '성능' WHEN 'd004' THEN '보안' WHEN 'd005' THEN '데이터' WHEN 'd006' THEN '기타' ELSE tc.test_type_code END AS test_type_name,
tc.status_code, CASE tc.status_code WHEN 'g001' THEN '활성' WHEN 'g002' THEN '비활성' ELSE tc.status_code END AS status_name,
tc.priority_code, CASE tc.priority_code WHEN 'c001' THEN '상' WHEN 'c002' THEN '중' WHEN 'c003' THEN '하' ELSE tc.priority_code END AS priority_name,
tc.pre_condition, tc.expected_result, tc.description, tc.exe_enviroment,
tc.created_by,
TO_CHAR(tc.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at, TO_CHAR(tc.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updated_at
FROM test_case tc JOIN project_version pv ON tc.version_id = pv.version_id
WHERE pv.project_id = #{projectId}
AND tc.version_id = #{versionId}
AND tc.test_type_code = #{testTypeCode}
AND tc.status_code = #{statusCode}
AND tc.priority_code = #{priorityCode}
AND tc.title LIKE '%' || #{title} || '%'
ORDER BY tc.created_at DESC, tc.test_case_id DESC
) base_query WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) inner_query WHERE inner_query.row_no >= #{startRow} ) page_tc
LEFT JOIN users creator ON page_tc.created_by = creator.user_id
ORDER BY page_tc.created_at DESC, page_tc.test_case_id DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'TC_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(test_case_id, -4))) + 1 FROM test_case WHERE test_case_id LIKE 'TC_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 1), 4, '0' ) FROM dual
INSERT INTO test_case ( test_case_id, version_id, title, test_type_code, status_code, priority_code, pre_condition, expected_result, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at, exe_enviroment ) VALUES ( #{testCaseId}, #{versionId}, #{title}, #{testTypeCode}, #{statusCode}, #{priorityCode}, #{preCondition}, #{expectedResult}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE, NULL, #{exeEnviroment} )

INSERT INTO test_case_step ( step_id, test_case_id, step_no, step_description, expected_result )
SELECT 'TCS_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(step_id, -4))) FROM test_case_step WHERE step_id LIKE 'TCS_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 0) + #{index} + 1, 4, '0' ) AS step_id, #{testCaseId} AS test_case_id, #{index} + 1 AS step_no, #{stepDescription} AS step_description, #{stepExpectedResultList[${index}]} AS expected_result FROM dual
mapper.select:
SELECT tc.test_case_id AS "testCaseId", tc.version_id AS "versionId", pv.version_name AS "versionName",
tc.title AS "title",
tc.test_type_code AS "testTypeCode", CASE tc.test_type_code WHEN 'd001' THEN '기능' WHEN 'd002' THEN 'UI/UX' WHEN 'd003' THEN '성능' WHEN 'd004' THEN '보안' WHEN 'd005' THEN '데이터' WHEN 'd006' THEN '기타' ELSE tc.test_type_code END AS "testTypeName",
tc.status_code AS "statusCode", CASE tc.status_code WHEN 'g001' THEN '활성' WHEN 'g002' THEN '비활성' ELSE tc.status_code END AS "statusName",
tc.priority_code AS "priorityCode", CASE tc.priority_code WHEN 'c001' THEN '상' WHEN 'c002' THEN '중' WHEN 'c003' THEN '하' ELSE tc.priority_code END AS "priorityName",
tc.pre_condition AS "preCondition", tc.expected_result AS "expectedResult", tc.description AS "description", tc.exe_enviroment AS "exeEnviroment",
tc.created_by AS "createdBy", NVL(u.login_id, tc.created_by) AS "createdByName",
TO_CHAR(tc.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "createdAt", TO_CHAR(tc.updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "updatedAt"
FROM test_case tc JOIN project_version pv ON tc.version_id = pv.version_id LEFT JOIN users u ON tc.created_by = u.user_id
WHERE tc.test_case_id = #{testCaseId} AND pv.project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT step_id AS "stepId", test_case_id AS "testCaseId", step_no AS "stepNo", step_description AS "stepDescription", expected_result AS "expectedResult" FROM test_case_step WHERE test_case_id = #{testCaseId} ORDER BY step_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE test_case SET version_id = #{versionId}, title = #{title}, test_type_code = #{testTypeCode}, status_code = #{statusCode}, priority_code = #{priorityCode}, pre_condition = #{preCondition}, expected_result = #{expectedResult}, description = #{description}, exe_enviroment = #{exeEnviroment}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE test_case_id = #{testCaseId}
